goals.title: Project skeleton and CLI smoke
goals.objective: Create package layout, CLI entrypoint, sample fixtures, CI/test baseline; prove CLI help/import tests pass.
goals.evidence: G001: package skeleton, CLI entrypoint, sample OHLCV fixture, pytest CLI smoke: 3 passed

goals.title: No-trade safety boundary first
goals.objective: Implement restricted read-only adapter boundary and tests proving v1 exposes no order endpoints or trading-permission config.
goals.evidence: G002: read-only policy/adapter and no-trade safety tests; pytest 8 passed

goals.title: Config schema, registries, manifests, ledger foundation
goals.objective: Add typed config validation, component registries, run manifest schema, and ledger schema/tests.
goals.evidence: G003: config validation, registries, manifest hash/write helpers, JSONL ledger tests; pytest 13 passed

goals.title: Minimal fixture walking skeleton
goals.objective: Run fixture OHLCV through one factor, PIT check, cost-aware simple backtest, manifest, and markdown report.
goals.evidence: G004: fixture OHLCV -> momentum -> PIT check -> cost-aware long/short -> report/manifest; pytest 15 passed

goals.title: Public/free data adapter contracts and local storage snapshots
goals.objective: Define public data adapter interfaces and local snapshot contracts for BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP with cadence >=1h validation.
goals.evidence: G005: public/free adapter contracts and local snapshot manifest storage; pytest 18 passed

goals.title: Factor DSL families and timeframe axis
goals.objective: Expose momentum, reversal, volatility, flow/supply-demand, and derivatives factors through config-only DSL.
goals.evidence: G006: config-only factor DSL covers momentum/reversal/volatility/flow/derivatives pressure; pytest 20 passed

goals.title: PIT and leakage validation hardening
goals.objective: Add adversarial PIT/leakage tests and known-at timestamp semantics.
goals.evidence: G007: PIT known-at, feature/label ordering, and pre/post event leak tests; pytest 24 passed

goals.title: Backtest diagnostics and cost metrics
goals.objective: Add IC, quantile returns, long/short, volatility, MDD, turnover, fees/slippage/funding proxies.
goals.evidence: G008: IC, quantile returns, long/short, volatility/MDD/turnover/cost/funding diagnostics; pytest 26 passed

goals.title: Sourced ETF event/window registry
goals.objective: Create source-backed event registry for ETF approval/trading/stabilization windows with metadata tests.
goals.evidence: G009: sourced SEC/Nasdaq/Cboe ETF event registry with approval/trading/stabilization windows; pytest 28 passed

goals.title: ETF multi-window regime report
goals.objective: Generate ETF regime comparison report with required metrics and limitations.
goals.evidence: G010: ETF multi-window regime report includes sources, IC/net/MDD/turnover/quantiles, and limitations; pytest 30 passed

goals.title: Autonomous config-only research loop
goals.objective: Implement dry-run loop that mutates configs only and ledgers hypotheses, config diffs, diagnostics, and Pareto decisions.
goals.evidence: G011: config-only variant proposal, Pareto+diagnostics decision, mandatory JSONL ledger rationale; pytest 33 passed

goals.title: Minimal dashboard demo
goals.objective: Expose reports, runs, and ledger state in a lightweight dashboard smoke-tested on local artifacts.

goals.title: E2E polish and portfolio narrative
goals.objective: Document one-command run, final README narrative, full verification, cleanup/review gate, and push readiness.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including all G001-G013 stories, under the approved RALPLAN constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
